---
name: Compat request
about: Create a compatibility report or request
title: "[COMPAT] "
labels: compat
assignees: zannagh

---

**Compatibility mod**
The name and ideally link to the source code or Modrinth/CurseForge page of the mod the issue is about.

**Description**
A clear and concise description of what the bug or request is.

**Game Version**
e.g. 1.21.x

**Mod Version**
e.g. 0.3.x

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expect to happen via the compatibility.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the request or report here.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.
